query:
-- property_owners: أعمدة إضافية
ALTER TABLE property_owners
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `falLicenseNumber` varchar(50) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `falLicenseExpiry` date NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `idType` enum('national_id','iqama','passport') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'national_id',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `idNumber` varchar(20) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `idExpiry` date NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `bankName` varchar(100) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `bankIban` varchar(34) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `managementFeeType` enum('percentage','fixed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'percentage',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `managementFeeValue` decimal(8,2) NULL DEFAULT 5.00,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `notes` text NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `isActive` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1;

-- brokers: أعمدة إضافية
ALTER TABLE brokers
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `falLicenseNumber` varchar(50) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `falLicenseExpiry` date NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `totalDeals` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `totalCommissions` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `rating` decimal(3,2) NULL DEFAULT 5.00,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `notes` text NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `isActive` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1;
